_doc: Arabian Nights (ARN) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/arn.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets; common sheet + uncommon sheet. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Small set, 78 cards. Two print sheets only (common + uncommon); there is no distinct rare rarity. Page gives no clean common/uncommon totals (cards classed by print frequency), so composition counts left null. Printed Belgium. 60 packs per box.
